problem.title: Why Pado Exists
problem.intro: Modern DeFi is powerful — but fragmented.

points.title: Fragmented Capital
points.description: Users manage multiple wallets and lock capital into isolated pools for trading, lending, or payments — reducing capital efficiency and increasing operational risk.

points.title: Protocol Sprawl
points.description: Each DeFi vertical — DEXs, perpetuals, lending protocols, staking — operates in isolation, forcing users to bridge liquidity and accept inconsistent custody assumptions.

points.title: Context Switching
points.description: Discussion and coordination happen off-platform — on X, Discord, and Telegram — far from execution. Insight rarely becomes action in time.

points.title: No Shared Financial Context
points.description: Existing platforms separate execution from information. Users constantly switch between trading interfaces and external channels to learn, coordinate, and compete.

problem.closing: Pado consolidates these functions into a single onchain financial system — one account with shared collateral, deterministic risk management, and embedded financial context.

coreInnovation.title: The Core Innovation
coreInnovation.subtitle: One Account, One Risk Engine
coreInnovation.intro: At the center of Pado is a Smart Account that represents a user's complete financial state.

features.title: Portfolio-Level Risk
features.description: All assets, positions, and liabilities are evaluated at the portfolio level — not per protocol, not per product. One unified view of your entire financial exposure.

features.title: Deterministic Enforcement
features.description: Risk is enforced deterministically onchain — no discretionary liquidations, no hidden rules. The same transparent rules apply to everyone.

features.title: Yield on Collateral
features.description: Capital earns yield while simultaneously backing leveraged positions — enabling capital efficiency previously only available in centralized exchanges, without the custody trade-off.

coreInnovation.closing: This architecture delivers centralized-exchange capital efficiency — without custody, opaque controls, or fragmented workflows.

features.title: Unified Margin
features.description: Cross-collateral margin across spot, perpetuals, and prediction markets. Your entire portfolio backs all positions simultaneously — no capital locked in silos.

features.title: Protocol-Level Execution
features.description: Because Nasun controls the consensus layer, conditional orders — take-profit, stop-loss, trailing stops — can execute at the validator level. No keeper bots. No single points of failure.

features.title: Intent-Based Automation
features.description: Set rules, not transactions. AI-integrated intent solvers enable advanced execution strategies — maintaining yield targets, rebalancing positions, or executing complex multi-step operations automatically.

features.title: Social Trading
features.description: Copy top traders with protocol-enforced risk limits. Position-gated groups ensure participants have skin in the game. Global chat, leaderboards, and real-time PnL sharing built into the execution layer.

trading.title: Trading
features: Spot and perpetual markets from the same account
Real CLOB orderbook powered by DeepBook V3
TradingView charts with 100+ indicators

prediction.title: Prediction Markets
features: YES/NO outcome orderbooks with real-time settlement
Create and trade on any verifiable event
Transparent odds driven by market participants

lottery.title: Weekly Lottery
features: Verifiable onchain randomness for provably fair draws
Multi-tier prizes with weekly rollover jackpots
Participate directly from your unified account

lending.title: Lending & Borrowing
features: Idle assets automatically earn yield
Instant borrowing against existing balances
No separate deposits or protocol interactions

payments.title: Payments
features: QR code transfers with instant settlement
Stablecoins remain liquid and usable at all times
Capital is never locked — it remains continuously productive

social.title: Social & Community
features: Global chat, leaderboards, and real-time PnL sharing
Copy-trading with protocol-enforced risk limits
Competitions and points system built into the execution layer

riskModes.title: Risk Modes for Every User
riskModes.intro: Pado allows users to opt into sophistication at their own pace.

modes.title: Safe Mode
modes.label: Default
features: Isolated margin — each trade stands alone
No leverage
Ideal for new users

modes.title: Pro Mode
modes.label: Opt-In
features: Cross-product collateral
Portfolio margin
Yield on collateral backing positions

modes.title: Institutional Mode
modes.label: Verified
features: Custom margin parameters
API access
Advanced asset support

riskModes.closing: All modes are enforced by the same onchain risk engine — ensuring fairness, predictability, and transparency across all participants.

koreaMarket.title: Global Product, Korea Market Entry
koreaMarket.intro: Pado is a global unified onchain finance application. Our regional entry strategy begins with South Korea — one of the world's most concentrated and active crypto markets.

items.label: The strategy
items.description: Establish a Korean legal entity and obtain VASP registration. Launch with self-custodial spot trading as the compliant entry point — a service Korean traders need and regulators can approve.

items.label: The regulatory landscape
items.description: South Korea ended a nine-year ban on corporate crypto trading in February 2026. An estimated $110B in Korean capital moved offshore due to limited domestic options. As regulations evolve, Pado's full product suite is ready to unlock market by market.

items.label: The long-term vision
items.description: Korea is the first market, not the only market. The same compliance-first playbook — local entity, VASP registration, progressive feature rollout — scales to every jurisdiction where onchain finance is gaining regulatory clarity.

flywheel.title: Three Verticals, One Flywheel
flywheel.intro: Pado is not a standalone product. It is the financial engine of the Nasun ecosystem.

items.description: DeFi users already hold NSN and operate onchain wallets — zero-friction adopters of Gen Sol's competitive gaming economy.
In-game transactions — NFT mints, tournament entries, marketplace trades — flow back through Pado's DEX as token demand.
Enterprise clients settle AI inference in stablecoin acquired through Pado. Executors lock NSN in staking tiers, tightening circulating supply.

flywheel.closing: One passkey wallet spans all three products. NSN serves triple duty as trading collateral, in-game currency, and executor stake. Reputation is chain-native — leaving means abandoning accumulated status across three systems simultaneously.

launchStatus.title: Launch Status
launchStatus.intro: Pado Alpha is live on Nasun devnet. The trading interface is operational — this is not a mockup.

live.title: Smart Account
live.description: Passkey authentication with biometric login. No seed phrases required.

live.title: Spot Trading
live.description: DeepBook V3 CLOB with 4 markets. TradingView charts, TP/SL orders, trailing stops.

live.title: Prediction Markets
live.description: YES/NO outcome orderbooks with real-time settlement and admin resolution.

live.title: Weekly Lottery
live.description: Multi-tier prizes with verifiable randomness via Sui Random.

live.title: Social Layer
live.description: Global chat, leaderboards, PnL sharing, competitions, and points system.

live.title: Portfolio Dashboard
live.description: PnL equity curves, per-market stats, risk metrics, and CSV export.

coming.title: Perpetual Futures
coming.description: Contracts deployed. UI complete. LP liquidity activation pending.

coming.title: Lending Markets
coming.description: Earn yield on idle assets. Contracts deployed on devnet.

coming.title: Cross-Chain Bridge
coming.description: Bring assets from Ethereum and other major chains.

coming.title: Protocol-Level Conditional Orders
coming.description: Validator-level execution — eliminating keeper bot dependency entirely.

cta.title: The Opportunity
cta.body: As DeFi matures, users are migrating toward platforms that offer fewer accounts, shared collateral, transparent risk, and integrated execution. Korean retail investors — 16 million strong — have no credible onchain venue for self-custody and transparent price discovery. Pado is built for this transition.
cta.tagline: One account. One margin system. One execution layer.
cta.closing: A financial platform designed for scale, safety, capital efficiency — and context.
cta.motto: Start simple. Grow sophisticated. Always in control.

footer.badge: Built on Nasun L1 · Move-based · Self-custodial · Apache 2.0
